name: WorldSphereMod3D
author: Melvin Shwuaner (fork)
description: Hard fork of WorldSphereMod that finishes the 3D conversion: voxelized actors/items, procedural building meshes, crossed-quad foliage, mesh water, directional sun + cascaded shadows, skeletal animation, worldspace UI. Co-installable with upstream WorldSphereMod. If the icon is red, your hardware lacks compute shader / GPU instancing support.
